text:
The exhibition “Dior: Crafting Fashion” shines a contemporary light on how the House’s heritage is formed, transmitted and reinterpreted. Opening at SCAD FASH in Atlanta, GA, and featuring almost 100 historical pieces, the seven thematic sections explore the creative process — from sketch to atelier, runway to red carpet, accessorising to artistic collaboration — within an unbroken cycle of transformation from Monsieur Dior to Jonathan Anderson.

Dior: Crafting Fashion at SCAD FASH Museum of Fashion + Film.

From 16 April to 23 August 2026.

Diorly by Jonathan Anderson.
 
Easy elegance slung over the shoulder.
 
In stores and on Dior.com.

Lady Woven by Jonathan Anderson.
 
A closer look at the construction of the new woven Lady Dior bag.

Lady Woven by Jonathan Anderson.
 
A new interpretation of the Lady Dior, in two-tone woven leather with an interior pouch. 
 
In stores and on Dior.com.

Dior Spring Summer 2026.

Grandeur juxtaposed with normality, playing with scale and contrast, and introducing the Dior Crunchy bag in puffy quilted leather.
 
In stores and on Dior.com

Discover Dior Double Cleansing ritual. 
New makeup removers, designed for all skin and makeup types, efficient on face, eyes and lips.
La Mousse OFF/ON boosts the removal of makeup residue and impurities for a perfectly clean skin.
 
#DiorBeauty #DiorSkincare #DiorSkinEssentials

La Mousse OFF/ON.
The cleanser that turns cleansing into skincare.
 
OFF: Eliminates 99%* of microparticles, makeup and sunscreen residue.
ON: Strengthens the skin barrier for 24 hours** and hydrates for 6 hours.*** Day after day, skin appears 3x brighter.***
 
* Instrumental test on 29 women.
** Instrumental test on 30 women.
*** Self-assessment by 40 people.
 
#DiorBeauty #DiorSkincare #DiorSkinEssentials

An essential step in every skincare routine, the iconic La Mousse OFF/ON provides deep cleansing and gentle care in one gesture.
Its patented formula eliminates 99% of microparticles*, sunscreen residue and makeup, for a purified, hydrated and more luminous skin.
 
* Instrumental test on 29 women.
 
#DiorBeauty #DiorSkincare #DiorSkinEssentials
